title: Make GitHub OIDC provider creation explicit in infra
Fix exit code scoping and workdir cleanup in main()
Update docs for default GitHub OIDC provider reuse
description: Bring infrastructure and integration docs in line with the new Terraform default that reuses the account's GitHub OIDC provider unless create_github_oidc_provider is set true.

title: Design AWS template infrastructure
Fix roborev OIDC provider index finding
description: Address roborev job 901 by replacing direct index access on the conditional GitHub OIDC provider resource with the safer one(...) form in Terraform locals.

title: Fix trim vs trimspace bug in infra/variables.tf
description: The trim() function in Terraform/OpenTofu requires two arguments. Use trimspace() instead for single-argument whitespace removal in the github_oidc_provider_arn validation.

title: Automate OIDC probe fallback on permission failure
Rewrite docs for AWS bootstrap and usage
notes: Blocked on final infrastructure and workflow implementation.

title: Add README live URL injection and envrc import coverage
description: Update the template docs and helper scripts so README live URLs can be refreshed from Terraform outputs and tofu import uses the default tfvars file.

title: Remove redundant shlex_quote wrapper
Refine OIDC probe conditions in materialize_config()
Loosen tests coupled to GitHub OIDC HCL details
description: Investigate tests failing after the Terraform GitHub OIDC provider change and update local tests to validate stable behavior rather than old HCL-specific implementation details.

title: Fix service name collision due to 40-char truncation
description: The _trim_name method truncates the integration prefix to the first 40 characters. When the repository name is long, this drops the unique part of the run_id (timestamp/PID), leading to name collisions in ECR and App Runner. The trimmer should preserve more uniqueness, possibly by using a hash or trimming from the middle/end.

title: Ignore local .codex directory
description: Add the local .codex workspace directory to .gitignore so local agent state does not appear as untracked repo content.

title: Load Terraform inputs from .env/.envrc instead of prod.tfvars
description: Use local env integration for single-environment repos so tofu apply does not rely on prod.tfvars for routine local usage. Update template and example app if adopted.

title: Implement AWS GitHub Actions deployment
notes: Blocked on infrastructure shape and outputs.

title: Improve IAM policy robustness for OIDC ARN
Refactor destroy command construction and shell usage
Prepare v0.3.1 changelog and release tag
description: Update the changelog for the current branch changes, assign the next release version, create the release commit, and tag it before opening and merging the PR.

title: Align OIDC probe exit codes and remove dead code
Defer git requirement in AWS integration runner
Move App Runner ownership fully into Terraform
description: Keep the template's AWS runtime resources under Terraform ownership so GitHub Actions only updates the deployed image, mirroring the app repo's ownership split.
